summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by job frontmatter, low-signal closeout is disabled, and no GitHub mutations are planned. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent maintainer review paths. Refs without hydrated live kind/state/updated_at are downgraded to item-scoped needs_human because deterministic validation requires live target_updated_at for keep_independent actions. Two security-shaped PRs are routed to central security handling only for their exact refs.

actions.reason: Independent PR review path; not a duplicate/closure candidate in this shard.
